ip_outcome_note: Card name, art, and species confirmed as Grapploct via PokemonTCG.io API (swsh8-153). Internal Pokemon IP — no external crossover risk.

trivia_bullets.text: Grapploct (National Pokedex no. 853) is categorized as the Jujitsu Pokemon. Design blends octopus anatomy with jujitsu and luchador fighter motifs: yellow face marking resembles a masked wrestler, tentacles function as both arms and legs, and one tentacle wraps midsection like a belt. Body described as pure muscle.
Grapploct is obtainable only in Pokemon Sword in the base games — not available in Pokemon Shield without trading. Galar-region species introduced Generation VIII (2019).
sources: screenrant.com How To Find Grapploct via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: Grapploct evolves from Clobbopus when leveled up while knowing the move Taunt — an unusual condition-based evolution rather than a simple level threshold or held item.
"Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea."
Grapploct and Golisopod living in Galar are described as natural predator-prey rivals — the winner of their brawls eats the loser.
sources: pokemondb.net Grapploct Sword Pokedex entry via WebSearch snippet

related_cards.name: Clobbopus
related_cards.note: Base form of the evolution line; same-set companion (152/264)

related_cards.name: Golisopod
related_cards.note: Galar rival species per Pokedex lore
